text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I got first place! First place! I feel one step closer
to being a great witch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You saw, right? There's nothing the genius
Magical Girl Sweepy can't do!
choice_data_list: Your running was magical out there!
Your running was magical out there!

And your witch training has only just begun,
right?

And your witch training has only just begun,
right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You saw, right? There's nothing the genius
Magical Girl Sweepy can't do!
choice_data_list: Your running was magical out there!
Your running was magical out there!

And your witch training has only just begun,

And your witch training has only just begun,

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Of course! This kinda thing is a piece of cake for
me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and speaking of! Go buy me something
sweet!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's my familiar's job to reward me when I win,
right? I've done my job, so now you do yours! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... I don't need you to tell me that, you
know!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm the genius Magical Girl Sweepy! I'm gonna be
a great witch in no time, just you watch!
